title: Trump Criticized Canada's China EV Deal—Elon Musk's Tesla Could Be Among Its Biggest Winners
sentences: Trump Criticized Canada's China EV Deal—Elon Musk's Tesla Could Be Among Its Biggest Winners Tesla Inc. could be reaping the benefits of the China-Canada EV agreement despite earlier criticism from President Donald Trump following the deal.
